sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82765" key="petrano/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πετρανός</orth>, perh. written for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὐετρανός</foreign> (Lat. <sense id="n82765.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">veteranus</tr_>), Judeich <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Altertümer von Hierapolis</tr_> No.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">202</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
